error_string: Job.batch "job-c4nbt" is invalid: status.startTime: Required value: startTime cannot be removed for unsuspended job

required_files.rationale: Contains the validation logic that generates the misleading 'startTime cannot be removed' error message. The format string is directly in this file.
Test file modified in the fix PR. Contains test cases that exercise the validation error path.

sufficient_files.rationale: Registry strategy test also updated in fix — validates end-to-end Job update behavior.

error_chain: User submits Job status update via kubectl/API
Validation returns field.Required error with misleading message
trigger_conditions: Job has session_type=single and is not suspended
User or controller modifies status.startTime (not just removes it)
The validation incorrectly treats any change as removal
